title: Thaumcraft 4 : Patched
description: An addon for the popular minecraft 1.7.10 mod Thaumcraft 4. Patch some bugs native to the mod.
body:
# A Thaumcraft 4 addon, bringing some bug patches.

This mod intends to patch some bugs from the mod Thaumcraft 4. You will find a config file to turn off/on each of the patches.

## Patched Bugs :
- **Bone Bow** research used to be stuck hidden in some cases -> it is now unlocked at spawn and won't need any other condition
- Golem with Lumber Core can now harvest trees, even if their harvest level has been tweaked by other mods like **[Harvest Level Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/harvest-level-config)**
- **Thaumic Exploration** used to add a bugged infusion recipe for some non-existant item "Necro Altar" -> it removes that recipe that can make crash other mods like **[Thaumcraft NEI Plugin : Patched](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft-nei-plugin-patched)**
- **Thaumic Exploration** add 16 Floating candles items/blocks, but the recipe for the black one was crashing the game -> patched !
- Adds the missing prereqs (forgotten by author) for some researches in TC4 addons :
  - **Thaumic Bases** :
    - Thaumium Bracelet, Void Bracelet and Void Wand Core
  - **Witching Gadgets** :
    - Witching Wearables

If you find some other things that need to be fixed (for Thaumcraft or its addons), please tell me !

# End of Modrinth support !
- The newest versions of the mod will only be available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thenemex/projects)
- These mods are essentially made for my modpack [**Thaumic Industries 2 - Expert**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumic-industries-2-expert), but I try my best to bring new features and config tweaks for everyone to enjoy !
